description: Style Note Look funky and fashionable in these capris from jealous 21. A brand all about the Fit, they offer you different hip sizes for every waist size to ensure just the right fit. Perfect to wear on a fun day out with friends, wear it on with your favourite colourful tee and heeled sandals.Product DetailsBlue washed cropped capris (ends approximately below the knee), buttoned and zipped closure, belt loops around the wait, brand patch at the back on the waistband, two insert pockets in front on the sides, one patch pocket inside the right insert pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail Material and Care 99.3 % cotton and 0.7 spandexMachine / Hand wash separately Do not bleachUse warm ironSize and FitIealous 21 hottie fitThe model (height 6' and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
